description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-status-indicator` (T3-01) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-status-indicator/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, status typed (active/inactive/error/warning/unknown), size typed, pulse prop typed
2. Accessibility — status communicated via aria-label or visually-hidden text (color alone is insufficient — WCAG 1.4.1), pulse animation respects prefers-reduced-motion, axe-core pass
3. Tests — all status states, size variants, with/without label, pulse, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all statuses, sizes, with contextual labels
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, color tokens for each status (not hardcoded), pulse animation, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-status-indicator/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-status-indicator — T3-01 antagonistic quality review
